message:
feat(cli,search,tui): expand robot CLI output, search response types, and deploy fixes

CLI robot.rs (+651 lines):
- Comprehensive machine-readable diagnostic output covering system health,
  agent registry status, reservation state, message queue depths,
  search index health, and deployment readiness checks
- JSON-structured reports suitable for CI/monitoring integration

Search lexical_response.rs:
- Refined response type fields for better client consumption

TUI tui_app.rs:
- Minor event handling adjustments

Share deploy.rs:
- Fix deployment pipeline edge case

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
